vllm:num_requests_running.help: Number of requests in model execution batches.

vllm:num_requests_waiting.help: Number of requests waiting to be processed.

vllm:engine_sleep_state.help: Engine sleep state; awake = 0 means engine is sleeping; awake = 1 means engine is awake; weights_offloaded = 1 means sleep level 1; discard_all = 1 means sleep level 2.

vllm:prefix_cache_queries.help: Prefix cache queries, in terms of number of queried tokens.

vllm:prefix_cache_queries_created.help: Prefix cache queries, in terms of number of queried tokens.

vllm:prefix_cache_hits.help: Prefix cache hits, in terms of number of cached tokens.

vllm:prefix_cache_hits_created.help: Prefix cache hits, in terms of number of cached tokens.

vllm:external_prefix_cache_queries.help: External prefix cache queries from KV connector cross-instance cache sharing, in terms of number of queried tokens.

vllm:external_prefix_cache_queries_creat.help: External prefix cache queries from KV connector cross-instance cache sharing, in terms of number of queried tokens.

vllm:external_prefix_cache_hits.help: External prefix cache hits from KV connector cross-instance cache sharing, in terms of number of cached tokens.

vllm:external_prefix_cache_hits_created.help: External prefix cache hits from KV connector cross-instance cache sharing, in terms of number of cached tokens.

vllm:mm_cache_queries.help: Multi-modal cache queries, in terms of number of queried items.

vllm:mm_cache_queries_created.help: Multi-modal cache queries, in terms of number of queried items.

vllm:mm_cache_hits.help: Multi-modal cache hits, in terms of number of cached items.

vllm:mm_cache_hits_created.help: Multi-modal cache hits, in terms of number of cached items.

vllm:num_preemptions.help: Cumulative number of preemption from the engine.

vllm:num_preemptions_created.help: Cumulative number of preemption from the engine.

vllm:iteration_tokens_total.help: Histogram of number of tokens per engine_step.

vllm:iteration_tokens_total_created.help: Histogram of number of tokens per engine_step.

vllm:request_max_num_generation_tokens.help: Histogram of maximum number of requested generation tokens.

vllm:request_max_num_generation_tokens_c.help: Histogram of maximum number of requested generation tokens.

vllm:request_params_n.help: Histogram of the n request parameter.

vllm:request_params_n_created.help: Histogram of the n request parameter.

vllm:request_params_max_tokens.help: Histogram of the max_tokens request parameter.

vllm:request_params_max_tokens_created.help: Histogram of the max_tokens request parameter.

vllm:time_to_first_token_seconds.help: Histogram of time to first token in seconds.

vllm:time_to_first_token_seconds_created.help: Histogram of time to first token in seconds.

vllm:inter_token_latency_seconds.help: Histogram of inter-token latency in seconds.

vllm:inter_token_latency_seconds_created.help: Histogram of inter-token latency in seconds.

vllm:e2e_request_latency_seconds.help: Histogram of e2e request latency in seconds.

vllm:e2e_request_latency_seconds_created.help: Histogram of e2e request latency in seconds.

vllm:request_queue_time_seconds.help: Histogram of time spent in WAITING phase for request.

vllm:request_queue_time_seconds_created.help: Histogram of time spent in WAITING phase for request.

vllm:request_inference_time_seconds.help: Histogram of time spent in RUNNING phase for request.

vllm:request_inference_time_seconds_crea.help: Histogram of time spent in RUNNING phase for request.

vllm:request_prefill_time_seconds.help: Histogram of time spent in PREFILL phase for request.

vllm:request_prefill_time_seconds_create.help: Histogram of time spent in PREFILL phase for request.

vllm:request_decode_time_seconds.help: Histogram of time spent in DECODE phase for request.

vllm:request_decode_time_seconds_created.help: Histogram of time spent in DECODE phase for request.

vllm:request_prefill_kv_computed_tokens.help: Histogram of new KV tokens computed during prefill (excluding cached tokens).

vllm:request_prefill_kv_computed_tokens_.help: Histogram of new KV tokens computed during prefill (excluding cached tokens).
